name: tidy-remove-legacy
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>implement>verify>review>audit |
 scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,correctness-first,quality-gates{tests,docs,compat},deterministic-output |
 lens: hickey-carmack |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Bounded scope allowed for the cleanup.

required_inputs.name: LEGACY_TARGETS
required_inputs.description: Concrete unnecessary files, stale docs, completed plan artifacts, aliases, patterns, or surfaces to remove or collapse.

required_inputs.name: CLEANUP_MODE
required_inputs.description: Type of legacy cleanup to execute.

required_inputs.name: PRESERVE_SURFACE
required_inputs.description: Files, interfaces, or public surfaces that must remain intact.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Non-goals, compatibility rules, or rollout constraints.
